description: A minimal, shareable workflow for extracting figures from Zotero PDFs into a review inbox, then organizing them into a searchable local figure knowledge base.
relation_fallback: Use this figure as a candidate reference for reading notes, writing, comparison, or figure design.

topics.name: Overview And Setup
topics.usage_note: Use for introductory framing, system setup, architecture overviews, and other context-setting figures.

topics.name: Workflow And Procedure
topics.usage_note: Use for methods, procedures, pipelines, implementation steps, and workflow-style figures.

topics.name: Quantitative Results
topics.usage_note: Use for plots, charts, tables, benchmarks, and other quantitative result displays.

topics.name: Images And Observations
topics.usage_note: Use for photographs, screenshots, scans, annotated panels, and other observation-first figure types.

topics.name: Models And Schematics
topics.usage_note: Use for conceptual explanation, model figures, mechanism diagrams, and schematic summaries.

topics.name: Comparison And Synthesis
topics.usage_note: Use for side-by-side comparisons, synthesis panels, summary figures, and review-style visuals.
